name: Crustless Spinach Quiche
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 325°F.
2. Cook the spinach according to package directions; drain and squeeze on paper towels to remove all liquid.
3. Beat the eggs; stir in the spinach, onion, cottage cheese, mozzarella cheese, and ham.
4. Pour into an ungreased 8- or 9-inch pie pan.
5. Sprinkle Parmesan cheese over top.
6. Bake for 1 hour. Cut into 6 wedges.
7. Leftovers can be reheated the next day.
